# Moments Packaging Kenya

> Nairobi-based custom paper packaging manufacturer. We make branded bags, boxes, cups, mailers, labels and gifting packaging for Kenyan brands. Order online, pay with M-Pesa, delivered nationwide.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Order quality paper packaging online with same-day Nairobi delivery.
- [Products](/products): Browse and configure custom packaging — bags, cups, boxes, mailers, labels, gifting.
- [Industries](/industries): Packaging for Food & Beverage, Agriculture, Textile, E-commerce, Gifting, Beauty, Pharma and Industrial.
- [About](/about): Our story, capacity and craftsmanship.
- [Contact](/contact): Get a custom quote within 24 hours.
- [Enterprise Quote](/enterprise-quote): Bulk orders above 10,000 units with dedicated pricing and account management.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on packaging design, materials and Kenyan brand stories.
- [Track Order](/orders/track): Look up an existing order.
